title: How Spotify runs agents across 20M+ lines of code, with Niklas Gustavsson
summary: Spotify employees use Claude agents to generate working prototypes across a codebase of 20M+ lines, with the ability to turn ideas into runnable code in one to two hours. VP of Engineering Niklas Gustavsson described the deployment at Spotify during a video presentation on Claude Cowork and Claude Code.
writeup: Niklas Gustavsson, VP of Engineering at Spotify, describes how employees use Claude agents to generate working prototypes across a codebase exceeding 20 million lines, turning ideas into runnable code in one to two hours. The presentation covers Claude Cowork and Claude Code as the tools enabling this deployment. The takeaway: agents operate at large codebase scale to compress prototyping time, with concrete application to product development.
